## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-15 — do not edit manually*

### Requests 2148 Bench Environment
*~2,400 tokens/session saved*
- In `psf__requests-2148`, use `python2` for quick import/repro probes when available; `python3.9` is not installed and modern Python imports fail on legacy `collections.Mapping` compatibility.
- If Python 3 import fails before the target code path, switch to a minimal `python2 -c` repro instead of retrying pytest/import variants.

### Forge Shell Commands
*~1,402 tokens/session saved*
- Avoid repeated `cd /home/floris/Documents/Repositories/Personal/AI/forge/.forge/swe... && python...` probes after environment failures; first identify the working interpreter (`which python2 python3 python3.9`) and run one targeted repro.

### Requests 2148 File Reads
*~1,117 tokens/session saved*
- `requests/models.py` is small enough (~28 KB) to read once up front; avoid repeated narrow reads around `iter_content` lines 615-660 after truncated/error output.
- For `mcp__forge__read_file` on `requests/models.py`, if a line-range read returns useful text but is marked error, use that output or read the whole file once.

### Forge Tool Semantics
*~900 tokens/session saved*
- Treat `mcp__forge__search` or `mcp__forge__read_file` responses marked `runtime_error` as usable when they contain the requested search/read text; do not retry just because the status is error.

### Requests 2148 Editing
*~270 tokens/session saved*
- When fixing `requests/models.py`, batch import and exception-handler changes with one `multi_edit`; avoid repeated single `Edit` calls against the same file/hunk.
